description: Implement the full-screen map view and sector selection screen. The map shows all explored rooms with annotations, and a sector selection screen lets the player choose which sector to enter at the start of a run or at sector junctions.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing 'M' toggles a full-screen map overlay showing all explored rooms and corridors.
Explored rooms are color-coded by power state (amber = powered, gray = dark, red = alerted).
The player's current position is highlighted on the map.
The player can annotate rooms by pressing a key while hovering: cycle through markers (dangerous, looted, point of interest).
At sector junction points (specific door tiles), the player can choose which sector to enter next from available options.
The sector selection screen shows sector name, difficulty indicator, and hazard info (if Scanner Array is repaired).
spec_section: A.3.4 Map & Minimap System, 4.3 Core Loop (PREPARE)
notes: Spec: 'Full-screen map mode with annotations. Sector overview shows known room connections, power grid status, atmosphere warnings.' Map data already tracked by the explored-tiles array from FOV story.
